mapper.sql: select id, title, content, excerpt, cover, author_id, category_id, status, is_featured, is_top, is_carousel, views, likes, comments, share_count, bookmark_count, published_at, link, editor_mode, content_markdown, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from portal_article
mapper.insert: insert into portal_article(title, content, excerpt, cover, author_id, category_id, status, is_featured, is_top, is_carousel, views, likes, comments, share_count, bookmark_count, published_at, link, editor_mode, content_markdown, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values(#{title}, #{content}, #{excerpt}, #{cover}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{isFeatured}, #{isTop}, #{isCarousel}, #{views}, #{likes}, #{comments}, #{shareCount}, #{bookmarkCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{link}, #{editorMode}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from portal_article where id in
#{item}
